---
title: "05. 德与滋养"
subtitle: "De, Nourishment, and Manifested Power"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 5
categories: [tao-te-ching, cultural, omega]
description: "How chapters 8, 10, 23, 38, 49, 51, 54, 55, 65, 79, and 81 map De as nourishing manifestation onto ring arithmetic and fiber capacity."
---

**Chapters:** 8, 10, 23, 38, 49, 51, 54, 55, 65, 79, 81  
**Omega Directions:** `ring arithmetic`, `fiber structure`

{{< include articles/category_05_de_nourishment.md >}}

---

[Back to Tao Te Ching Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)


## Infographic

![category_05_de_nourishment Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_de_nourishment_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_de_nourishment_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_de_nourishment_infographic.png)
